data.title: PayPal Pushes Further Into Crypto by Adding Chainlink and Solana as New Offerings
data.description:
• PayPal and Venmo users in the U.S. can now buy, sell, and transfer LINK and SOL, along with other tokens already supported.
  • The new tokens will be available to U.S. users over the next few weeks.
  • This move is part of PayPal's continued expansion into the cryptocurrency space following its initial launch of crypto support in 2020.

data.title: Crypto Outperforms Nasdaq as BTC Becomes 'U.S. Isolation Hedge' Amid $5T Equities Carnage
data.description:
• U.S. equities lost $5.4 trillion in value in two days after President Trump unveiled his reciprocal tariffs.
  • Bitcoin and the broader crypto market fell less sharply, with BTC down 6% compared to Nasdaq's 11%.
  • Standard Chartered sees bitcoin as a potential hedge against traditional finance instability.

data.title: Circle’s IPO Filing Tests Crypto Market Confidence After Trump’s Tariff Shock
data.description:
• Circle filed for an IPO with the SEC, becoming the first major stablecoin issuer to take this step amid a shaky market and unresolved U.S. crypto regulations.
  • Analysts point to Circle’s declining margins and high costs as risks, even as the company bets on long-term demand for tokenized dollars and payments infrastructure.
  • A successful IPO could reignite hopes for other crypto firms like Kraken and Gemini to enter public markets, but most are likely to wait for more regulatory clarity in 2025.

data.title: Bitcoin Begins to Decouple From Nasdaq as U.S. Stocks Crumble
data.description:
• Bitcoin has held up relatively well as stocks have plunged since the Trump tariff announcement late Wednesday.
  • The divergence grew Friday as the Nasdaq fell another 5% but bitcoin managed a small gain.
  • One analyst suggested the bid for bitcoin in the face of the market panic is coming from aggressive buying from those companies with BTC treasury strategies.

data.title: Jerome Powell Makes No Promise to Ease Policy; Fed to Stay Focused on Inflation
data.description:
• U.S. Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell promised to keep his eye on the inflation ball even as the president's tariff policies threw markets into a panic.
  • He said the central bank is well-positioned to wait to consider adjustments to current policy.
  • U.S. stocks are plunging for second consecutive day, but bitcoin is beginning to show signs of decoupling.

data.title: Gold-Backed Cryptocurrencies Retreat From All-Time Highs Amid Stock-Market Rout
data.description:
• Gold fell after hitting a record high as markets reacted to Trump’s reciprocal tariffs.
  • Global equities tumbled on Thursday, forcing investors to sell the precious metal to raise cash.
  • Central banks bought more gold in February, led by Poland and China.

data.title: Riot Platforms Hits Post-Halving Bitcoin Production High as It Expands AI Capacity
data.description:
• Riot mined 533 BTC in March 2025—up 13% from February and 25% year-over-year, marking its highest monthly output since the halving.
  • A study by Altman Solon validates 600 MW development potential at the company's Corsicana facility, for a total of 1.0 GW secured power and strategic proximity to Dallas.
  • Operating hash rate increased to 30.3 EH/s (+3% MoM), fleet efficiency improved to 21.0 J/TH, and bitcoin holdings grew to 19,223 BTC.

data.title: Cardano Foundation Targets $1.7B Data Breach Threat With New Privacy Tools
data.description:
• The Cardano Foundation has launched Veridian, an open-source platform for managing digital identities.
  • Veridian Wallet allows users to securely prove their identity online without sharing sensitive data.
  • The platform addresses security flaws in current systems, offering integration with the Cardano blockchain for enhanced assurance.

data.title: GameStop CEO Cohen Buys $10M of GME Shares Following Bitcoin Acquisition Plan
data.description:
• Ryan Cohen, chairman and CEO of GameStop, increased his stake in the company, buying 500,000 additional shares for $10.78 million.
  • Cohen now owns 8.4% of the company's outstanding shares.
  • The purchase follows GameStop's decision to invest in bitcoin as a treasury reserve asset and its $1.5 billion capital raise which closed earlier this week.

data.title: Creators of DeFi Firm Aave Launch Social Media Developer Network Lens Chain
data.description:
• This developer-friendly layer 2 environment is propelled by composable features designed to unleash the economic potential of decentralized “SocialFi.”
  • Lens has cemented partnerships with several DeFi and infrastructure projects including Uniswap, Balancer, LayerZero, Circle, Consensys and Chainlink.
